reason: Defines this Neovim UI/plugin configuration as the frontend layer and identifies lua/plugins/*.lua as in scope.
Requires plugin-specific UI/keymaps to stay with the owning plugin and documents the Snacks/TogglerTerm terminal ownership conventions.
Covers keymap grouping, plugin-owned keymap descriptions, terminal scoping, and required Neovim verification for UI/config changes.
Guides the refactor to extract cohesive existing logic without introducing duplicate helper code or premature abstraction.
